title: How to Put a Quran Verse on Your iPhone Lock Screen
description: A step-by-step guide to showing a daily Quran verse on your iPhone lock screen using widgets, wallpapers, and iOS Focus modes. Works on iOS 16 and later.

title: How to Set Up a Quran Focus Mode on Your iPhone
description: Use an iOS Focus mode to turn prayer and quiet time into a calm, distraction-free moment with the Quran on your iPhone. A step-by-step setup for iOS 16 and later.
